title: Starlevka's Optimized | Hypixel Skyblock
description: Hypixel Skyblock Modpack on Forge 1.8.9 for Mid/End game players optimized with pretty FPS
body:
# Made by a player, for players ![Hypixel Skyblock Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f790238180f12d4218191da56fd3af331dd600.png) This modpack provides to play on Hypixel Skyblock with COOL FPS and using known QOL SKYBLOCK MODS and CT's MODULES! **1.8.9 is already old version of minecraft, so, it could be a little bit laggy** (Im tried to fix it, but if you have so much lag spikes, Im recommend you to disable ChatTriggers and use theirs alternatives with current mods, ofc, please, **install OptiFine** :P) ## ⚠️ WARNING! OptiFine missed in this modpack! ### OptiFine Installation 1. Install **OptiFine** 2. Put .jar in your mod folder 3. Restart/Start your game ## ☕ JVM Arguments These arguments might optimize your Java (cool thing, actually) If this not works well, then remove them :<
➡️ My JVM Arguments ⬅️ ``` -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -XX:StringDeduplicationAgeThreshold=3 -XX:+DisableExplicitGC ```
## ⚙️ Featured Skyblock Mods
  • SkyHanni
  • SkyblockAddons Unofficial
  • Skytils
  • Odin
  • NotEnoughUpdates
  • ChatTriggers (his modules are hungry on your FPS)
  • Secret Routes Mod (not included in newest modpacks rn because im forgor)
    SkyClient Updater Powered by SkyClient
    SkyClient Cosmetics Powered by SkyClient
    ## Featured Skyblock ChatTriggers
  • AzuredClient
  • BetterMap
  • Bloom
    • ## 📌 FPS goes BRRR (Hub 2, 53 players) **Make sure that you have downloaded and installed OptiFine** ![FPS TEST | Hub 2 | 53 players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8c9c7ce0f7bd94446b7c209234c82bba161b0b.jpeg) ## **All Mods and their's authors**
    ➡️ Here ⬅️
    • EntityCulling by tr7zw
    • SkyHanni by hannibal2
    • Redirectionor [Retro] by Hileb
    • Skytils by My-Name-Is-Jeff, Sychic
    • Odin by Odtheking, Cezar, Stivais, Bonsai, Ilmars
    • SkyblockAddons Unofficial by Fix3dll, Biscut
    • Patcher by Polyfrost, Sk1er LLC
    • Chatting by Polyfrost
    • Velox Caelo by Linnea Gräf
    • NotEnoughUpdates by Moulberry and many others
    • SkyClient Updater by My-Name-Is-Jeff, SkyClient, Deftu
    • SkyClient Cosmetics by koxx12, Wyvest
    • ChatTriggers by FalseHonesty, Ecolsson, kerbybit
    • Profiler Fix, no link, no author (resourse not known for me, please dm me)
    • Fullbright Plus by Ghosty
    • Inventory HUD+ by DmitryLovin
    • Wavey Capes by tr7zw
    • PolyCrosshair by Polyfrost
    • PolyNametag by Polyfrost
    • VanillaHUD by Polyfrost
    • Secret Routes Mod by yourboykyle, Wyan (wyannnnn)
    **Other:**
    My 1.21.4+ Hypixel Skyblock Modpack # Starlev's Skyblock Modpack 1.21.4+
    Alternative Hypixel Skyblock Modpack on 1.21.10 # Mega's Skyblock
